name: EGB OE TL.Z./HENKEL VZ
summary: Henkel AG & Co. KGaA is a German chemical and consumer goods company headquartered in Düsseldorf. The company operates in three business units: Adhesive Technologies, Beauty Care, and Laundry & Home Care. Henkel manufactures and markets a wide range of products, including adhesives, sealants, functional coatings, laundry detergents, hair care products, and beauty products.
